mapper.sql: m.id, m.connection_id, m.model_name, m.source_type, m.capabilities_json::text as capabilities_json, m.test_status, m.tested_config_version, m.last_test_at, m.enabled, m.hidden_at, m.created_at, m.updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into model_connection_models(connection_id, model_name, source_type, capabilities_json, test_status, tested_config_version, last_test_at, enabled, created_at, updated_at) values(#{connectionId}, #{modelName}, #{sourceType}, cast(#{capabilitiesJson} as jsonb), #{testStatus}, #{testedConfigVersion}, #{lastTestAt}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select from model_connection_models m where m.id=#{modelId} and m.connection_id=#{connectionId} and m.hidden_at is null
select from model_connection_models m where m.connection_id=#{connectionId} and m.hidden_at is null order by m.model_name

select from model_connection_models m join model_connections c on c.id=m.connection_id where m.id=#{modelId} and m.connection_id=#{connectionId} and m.hidden_at is null and m.enabled and m.test_status='PASSED' and m.tested_config_version=c.config_version and c.status='ACTIVE' and c.deleted_at is null

select from model_connection_models m join model_connections c on c.id=m.connection_id where m.connection_id=#{connectionId} and m.hidden_at is null and m.enabled and m.test_status='PASSED' and m.tested_config_version=c.config_version and c.status='ACTIVE' and c.deleted_at is null order by m.model_name
mapper.insert: insert into model_connection_models(connection_id, model_name, source_type, capabilities_json, test_status, tested_config_version, last_test_at, enabled, created_at, updated_at) values(#{connectionId}, #{modelName}, #{sourceType}, cast(#{capabilitiesJson} as jsonb), #{testStatus}, #{testedConfigVersion}, #{lastTestAt}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) on conflict (connection_id, model_name) do update set source_type=case when model_connection_models.source_type='MANUAL' then 'MANUAL' when excluded.source_type='DISCOVERED' then 'DISCOVERED' else model_connection_models.source_type end, capabilities_json=coalesce(excluded.capabilities_json, model_connection_models.capabilities_json), test_status=case when model_connection_models.hidden_at is not null and excluded.source_type in ('DISCOVERED', 'MANUAL') then 'UNVERIFIED' else model_connection_models.test_status end, tested_config_version=case when model_connection_models.hidden_at is not null and excluded.source_type in ('DISCOVERED', 'MANUAL') then null else model_connection_models.tested_config_version end, last_test_at=case when model_connection_models.hidden_at is not null and excluded.source_type in ('DISCOVERED', 'MANUAL') then null else model_connection_models.last_test_at end, enabled=case when model_connection_models.hidden_at is not null and excluded.source_type in ('DISCOVERED', 'MANUAL') then false else model_connection_models.enabled end, hidden_at=case when model_connection_models.hidden_at is not null and excluded.source_type in ('DISCOVERED', 'MANUAL') then null else model_connection_models.hidden_at end, updated_at=excluded.updated_at
mapper.update: update model_connection_models set test_status='UNVERIFIED', tested_config_version=null, last_test_at=null, enabled=false, updated_at=#{updatedAt} where connection_id=#{connectionId}
update model_connection_models set hidden_at=#{hiddenAt}, enabled=false, updated_at=#{hiddenAt} where id=#{modelId} and connection_id=#{connectionId} and hidden_at is null
